query.text:
if dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$CheckSQLInjection(@stt_rec) = 0 return &GLTranReportSql; else begin declare @ma_tt nvarchar(16), @so_tt nvarchar(255), @so_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ten_bc nvarchar(255), @ten_bc2 nvarchar(255) select @ma_tt = rtrim(ltrim(val)) from options where name='r_cdkt' select @so_tt=so_tt, @so_tt2 = so_tt2, @ngay_tt = ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 = ngay_tt2 from report1 where ma_tt=@ma_tt select @ten_bc = ten_bc, @ten_bc2=ten_bc2 from report2 where ma_tt=@ma_tt and sysid='ISTran' -- Lay tk_vt trong dmvt cach nhau bang dau ',' create table #dmtkvt(tk_vt nvarchar(64)) insert into #dmtkvt select distinct tk_vt from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join d85$$partition$current b with(nolock) on (a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec) where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @tk_vt nvarchar(64) = '' select @tk_vt = @tk_vt + ', ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(tk_vt)) from #dmtkvt select @tk_vt = LTRIM(RIGHT(@tk_vt, LEN(@tk_vt) - 1)) drop table #dmtkvt
-- Lấy tài khoản đối ứng(tk_co) create table #dmtkco(tk_co nvarchar(64)) insert into #dmtkco select distinct tk_du from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join d85$$partition$current b with(nolock) on (a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec) where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @tk_co nvarchar(64) = '' select @tk_co = @tk_co + ', ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(tk_co)) from #dmtkco select @tk_co = LTRIM(RIGHT(@tk_co, LEN(@tk_co) - 1)) drop table #dmtkco
declare @m_ma_nt0 varchar(10) select @m_ma_nt0 = val from options where name = N'm_ma_nt0' select a.ong_ba, a.dien_giai, ltrim(a.so_ct) as so_ct, rtrim(a.ma_kho) ma_kho, isnull(b.ten_kho,'') ten_kho, isnull(b.ten_kho2,'') ten_kho2, rtrim(a.ma_khon) ma_khon, isnull(c.ten_kho,'') ten_khon, isnull(c.ten_kho2,'') ten_khon2, a.t_tien, a.t_tien_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tien, @@language) t_tien_in_word, '' t_tien_nt_in_word, replace(str(day(ngay_ct),2),' ','0') ngay, replace(str(month(ngay_ct),2),' ','0') thang, cast(year(ngay_ct) as char(4)) nam, @tk_vt as tk_no, @tk_co as tk_co, @so_tt as so_tt, @so_tt2 as so_tt2, @ngay_tt as ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 as ngay_tt2, @ten_bc as ten_bc, @ten_bc2 as ten_bc2 from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join dmkho b with(nolock) on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho left join dmkho c with(nolock) on a.ma_khon = c.ma_kho where stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @key varchar(128) select @key = 'a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec pr_PrintITTran @@language, @key, 'd85$$partition$current', @@id end
